children.name: hwChassisPowerMngtTable
children.description: This table describes chassis-level power consumption attributes.

children.name: hwEnergySavingCapabilityMngtTable
children.description:
This table describes the energy-saving capability, including energy-saving methods and parameters.
                The index is hwEnergySavingCapabilityDescIndex.

children.name: hwEnergySavingCapabilityDescIndex
children.description: This object indicates the index of the energy saving capability description.

children.name: hwEnergySavingMethodTable
children.description: This table is used to query the energy saving mode.

children.name: hwEnergySavingMethodIndex
children.description: This object indicates the index of the energy saving mode.

children.name: hwEnergySavingParameterTable
children.description: This table describes the variable of the energy saving mode.

children.name: hwEnergySavingMode
children.description: This object indicates the NE-level energy saving mode.

children.name: hwEnergySavingDescReqMode
children.description: This object indicates the method of obtaining the energy saving capability description file.

children.name: hwCurrentPower
children.description: This object indicates the current power consumption of an NE.

children.name: hwPowerStatPeriod
children.description: This object indicates the update period of power consumption data.

children.name: hwPoEType
children.description:
powered type:
                PSE(1): power supplier.
                PD(2): powered deivce.
                noPoe(255): not PSE or PD

children.name: hwPSEPower
children.description: The output power(milliwatt) by a PSE. For a non-PSE device, the value is zero.

children.name: hwAveragePower
children.description: This object indicates the average power consumption of an NE within a measurement period.

children.name: hwTypicalPower
children.description: This object indicates the typical consumption of an NE.

children.name: hwPowerConsumption
children.description: This object indicates the accumulated power consumption of an NE.

children.name: hwThresholdOfPower
children.description: This object indicates the NE power consumption threshold.
